docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-15-2020 - JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC., REPRESENTED BY SOFIA REYES, LEEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST IS PRESENT.
